problem id: b74a49c4
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(5) AND NOT SHR(5)) XOR NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  10101010 -> 10101111
  10010111 -> 10001101
  00110011 -> 00011001
  01001000 -> 11110110
  01110011 -> 00010011
  00000100 -> 01111111
  11110001 -> 01000111
  10110110 -> 00101101

query: 11000001
predicted answer: 01000111
